title: When displaying simultaneously a Gantt and a board, ability to hide column
excerpt:
Hi, 
when displaying a gantt and a board under the gantt chart, we should have the possibility to hide columns of the board in order to focus on essential informations to share

posts.author: vielmont (Jean-Luc Vielmont)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

when displaying a gantt and a board under the gantt chart, we should have the possibility to hide columns of the board in order to focus on essential informations to share
